インタフェース RLEpisodeFactory

既知の実装クラスのリスト:
MultiPartyRLSimulatorFactory, SinglePartyRLEpisodeFactory
public interface RLEpisodeFactory
Creates simulator episodes together with the party-specific metadata required by RL.
